name: Dogtag PKI
description: Dogtag PKI — open source certificate system developed as part of Red Hat Certificate System.

seo.title: Dogtag PKI — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Dogtag PKI: Dogtag PKI — open source certificate system developed as part of Red Hat Certificate System.

when_to_use: On-premise certificate authority deployment for enterprise PKI
Smart card credential issuance for government identity programs
TLS certificate lifecycle management for Red Hat environments
SCEP-based device certificate enrollment for MDM systems
OCSP responder setup for certificate revocation checking

pros: Supports CA, KRA, OCSP, TPS subsystems
Upstream of Red Hat Certificate System
No license fees even at scale
cons: Docs skew toward Red Hat/Fedora users
Java stack can feel heavy for small shops
Community support thinner than commercial PKI
review.verdict: Capable open-source PKI if you have patience and Red Hat expertise; rough going otherwise.
review.best_for: Red Hat shops wanting RHCS features without the subscription.
review.not_for: Teams who'd rather pay for a managed PKI or use Smallstep.
